name: Traditional Scottish Shortbread
recipeIngredient: Extra Sugar for Sprinkling on Top
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, cornstarch, and sugar into a mixing bowl.
2. Cut in the butter using your fingertips until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Transfer the shortbread mixture to an ungreased baking tin.
4. Prick the shortbread all over with a fork.
5. Bake in a preheated low oven (150°C/300°F/gas 2) for about 1 hour, or until lightly golden.
6. Remove from the oven and sprinkle generously with sugar while it is still hot.
7. Allow to cool completely on a wire rack before cutting into squares or rectangles.
8. Store in an airtight container.
